top_signals.title: US regulator’s change of tack comes with risk of obscuring audit flaws
top_signals.summary: The PCAOB has signalled a shift from individual checks towards firm-wide quality controls

top_signals.title: Sara Duterte Faces Impeachment Trial With Philippine Presidential Dream At Stake
top_signals.summary: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte faces a contentious trial in the Senate, a case that could end her political career or leave her as the top contender to succeed archrival Ferdinand Marcos Jr. as president.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Baillie Gifford pursues ‘voluntary exits’ under new strategy
top_signals.summary: Scheme for UK-based staff comes as firm refocuses on areas such as family offices and financial advisers in US and Asia
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EasyJet shares soar 10% as budget airline agrees to $7.3 billion Castlelake takeover
top_signals.summary: EasyJet shares surged in early dealmaking Monday after it agreed in principle to takeover bid from Castlelake.
